creator: freebsd@m.jl.ly
text:
There's a new version of xml2rfc. If you update the Makefile and makesum, it works.

I'd suggest changing the message in pkg-message to something like this:

See https://authors.ietf.org/en/references-in-rfcxml for advice
on using the reference library at https://bib.ietf.org/
